## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Changes respect the calm, calendar-native design language
- [ ] Accessibility considered (keyboard, ARIA, reduced motion, contrast)
- [ ] No new dependencies without discussion
